subcodes.first_line: O ye two souls who have believed in God! From the day of my departure from Paris until now, I have ever been mindful of you, and from the bounties [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای دو نفس مومن بالله از یوم مفارقت از پاریس الی الان همیشه بیاد شماها هستم و از الطاف
subcodes.subjects: @power; greatness; centrality of the Covenant, @call to action
